Motion For Relief From Waiver Of Objections
Off Calendar Dec-18-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing re:DEFENDANT FORD MOTOR COMPANY's Motion For Relief From Waiver Of Objections.

No appearances made. The court adopts the tentative ruling.

Defendant's motion for relief from waiver of objections is granted; no timely opposition filed.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Richard B Ulmer Jr; Clerk: K.Valdes; Not reported.(302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiff'S Request For Production Of Documents, Set One
Off Calendar Dec-17-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing re:PLAINTIFF EDEN TERAN's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiff'S Request For Production Of Documents, Set One.

No appearances made. The court adopts its tentative ruling.

Ordered off calendar for plaintiff's noncompliance with Local Rule 2.7(B) (courtesy copies). Upon compliance, motion may be re-set for any court day after January 2. Papers shall bear new hearing date. Having already complied with Local Rule 2.7(B), defendant need not re-file its papers.

Judge:Richard B Ulmer Jr; Clerk: K.Valdes; Not Reported.(302/RBU)
